emails.subject: RE: Contract for: S &E Oilfield
emails.body: RE: Contract for: S &E Oilfield Don't I also need to prepare a confirmation?

emails.subject: RE: Contract for: S &E Oilfield
emails.body: RE: Contract for: S &E Oilfield Has the contract been sent out yet?

emails.subject: RE: Contract for: S &E Oilfield
emails.body: Here is the contract, I am still working on the confirm. Do you want me to send the contract/confirm to the customer or will you? To: Perlingiere, Debra

emails.subject: RE: Contract for: S &E Oilfield
emails.body: If you would, please send the confirm. Two additions: 1. I think that the language for the pricing should include "less applaicable gathering and processing fees incurred by the Buyer, including those fees charged by Gatherco, Inc.". 2. The Pipeline for Mtr 717457 is Gatherco, Inc. To: Perlingiere, Debra

emails.subject: RE: Contract for: S &E Oilfield
emails.body: Is this a yearly contract or month to month? Do you want 30 day notice or 60 day for year contract?
